name: coTfsTimingSDOStop
title: coTfsTimingSDOStop
description: This function is replaced by coTfsMonitorDeactivate.
tables: Obsolete Function This function is replaced by coTfsMonitorDeactivate.
The function stops the monitoring of SDO response times. The already saved values are not lost. The monitoring can be resumed with coTfsTimingSDOStart().
nodeId 0: for all nodes 1..127: for a special node
Example coTfsTimingSDOStop( 0 ); // stop SDO time recording for all nodes
